languages.text: {n}Эоганн деловито кивает, поглядывая на строки данных, бегущие по инфопластине. Мехадендриты, ощетинившись множеством игл, начинают быстро сшивать раны на его теле.{/n}
{n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Эоганн деловито кивает, поглядывая на строки данных, бегущие по инфопластине. Мехадендриты, ощетинившись множеством игл, начинают быстро сшивать раны на его теле.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}
{n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}
{n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn nickt kurz und wirft einen Blick auf die über seinen Datablock laufenden Daten. Die mit Nadeln besetzten Mechadendriten fangen an, die Wunden an seinem Körper zu nähen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn nickt kurz und wirft einen Blick auf die über seinen Datablock laufenden Daten. Die mit Nadeln besetzten Mechadendriten fangen an, die Wunden an seinem Körper zu nähen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn hoche la tête et lance un regard aux lignes de données qu'affiche sa plaque. Les mécadendrites, hérissées de pointes, commencent à recoudre rapidement les plaies sur son corps.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn hoche la tête et lance un regard aux lignes de données qu'affiche sa plaque. Les mécadendrites, hérissées de pointes, commencent à recoudre rapidement les plaies sur son corps.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊奥贡干脆地点点头，目光掠过数据板上滚动的数据流。布满针头的机械触须开始迅速缝合他身上的伤口。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}伊奥贡干脆地点点头，目光掠过数据板上滚动的数据流。布满针头的机械触须开始迅速缝合他身上的伤口。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn asiente brevemente, mirando las líneas de datos que recorren la tablilla de datos. Las mecadendritas, cubiertas de agujas, rápidamente cosen las heridas de su cuerpo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eogunn asiente brevemente, mirando las líneas de datos que recorren la tablilla de datos. Las mecadendritas, cubiertas de agujas, rápidamente cosen las heridas de su cuerpo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}エオガンは頷き、インフォプレートを横切るデータの線に目をやる。メカデンドライトが針でうごめきながら、エオガンの体の傷を縫い始める。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eoghan nods, glancing at the lines of data running across the infoplate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch the wounds on his body.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eogunn, hızlıca başını sallayarak databeladan akan veri satırlarına göz atıyor. İğnelerle kaplı mekadentritler, vücudundaki yaraları hızla dikmeye başlıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Eogunn nods briskly, sparing a look at the lines of data running across the data-slate. The mechadendrites, bristling with needles, begin to rapidly stitch together the wounds on his body.{/n}
